description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage job named pages that runs on the default Docker image. In the pages job execute the shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. Publish the resulting public/ directory as an artifact (paths: public) and configure the job to run only on the master branch, deploying the artifact to GitLab Pages. Ensure the job is assigned to the deploy stage.
